# [Product] Upgrade Players and Player Detail intelligence pages

Labels: `area: product-experience`, `type: feature`, `priority: medium`, `status: ready`
Milestone: `v0.4 Match + Player Intelligence`

## Objective

Turn player pages into contribution board and contribution profile surfaces.

## Context

Player pages should explain starts, involvement, contribution signals, and
available caveats without pretending incomplete data is complete.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Players page supports contribution scanning and leaderboards.
- [ ] Player Detail summarizes contribution profile using API-backed data.
- [ ] Caveats and incomplete data states are visible.
- [ ] Frontend build passes.
